# How To Grow Herbs On Your Balcony

Herbs are easy.

## Sunlight needs

Most culinary herbs need at least six hours of direct sun. South-facing balconies work best.

## Watering schedule

Small pots dry out fast. Check daily in summer and water when the top inch is dry.

## Best herbs for beginners

Basil, mint, chives, and parsley tolerate mistakes and regrow after harvesting.
